title: seal ANTHROPIC_API_KEY into website-secrets on both clusters
description:
## Summary

- Seals `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` into `website/website-secrets` (mentolder) and `website-korczewski/website-secrets` (korczewski-ha)
- Key is used by the website for meeting insights (`claude.ts`) and coaching classification
- LiteLLM router remains local-only — no Anthropic fallback (removed in #648)
- Also adds the `2026-05-10-local-llm-pipeline.md` implementation plan to the docs

## Test plan

- [x] `task env:seal ENV=mentolder` — clean, no placeholders detected
- [x] `task env:seal ENV=korczewski` — clean, no placeholders detected
- [x] Sealed secrets applied to both clusters, `website-secrets.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` verified (108 chars) on both
- [x] `task feature:website` — website rolled on both clusters successfully
